name: IdsEyeMedProvRowCntBal

text.value: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.ZJDA_TMP_IdsEyeMedProvRowCntBal; SELECT PROV.SRC_SYS_CD_SK as TRGT_SRC_SYS_CD_SK,PROV.PROV_ID as TRGT_PROV_ID,B_PROV.SRC_SYS_CD_SK as SRC_SRC_SYS_CD_SK,B_PROV.PROV_ID as SRC_PROV_ID INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.ZJDA_TMP_IdsEyeMedProvRowCntBal FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG MPPNG,@{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.PROV PROV FULL OUTER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.B_PROV B_PROV ON PROV.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = B_PROV.SRC_SYS_CD_SK AND PROV.PROV_ID = B_PROV.PROV_ID WHERE PROV.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.ExtrRunCycle} AND PROV.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = MPPNG.CD_MPPNG_SK AND MPPNG.TRGT_CD = 'EYEMED'; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.ZJDA_TMP_IdsEyeMedProvRowCntBal_Research; SELECT TRGT_SRC_SYS_CD_SK,TRGT_PROV_ID,SRC_SRC_SYS_CD_SK,SRC_PROV_ID INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.ZJDA_TMP_IdsEyeMedProvRowCntBal_Research FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.ZJDA_TMP_IdsEyeMedProvRowCntBal WHERE TRGT_SRC_SYS_CD_SK IS NULL OR TRGT_PROV_ID IS NULL OR SRC_SRC_SYS_CD_SK IS NULL OR SRC_PROV_ID IS NULL; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.ZJDA_TMP_IdsEyeMedProvRowCntBal_Notify; SELECT TOP 1 'ROW COUNT BALANCING EYEMED - IDS PROV OUT OF TOLERANCE' as NOTIFICATION INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.ZJDA_TMP_IdsEyeMedProvRowCntBal_Notify FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.ZJDA_TMP_IdsEyeMedProvRowCntBal WHERE '@{pipeline().parameters.ToleranceCd}'='OUT';
